title: Error requiring built-in 'fs' module in n8n
symptom: When trying to use the 'fs' module in a Function node, n8n throws an error indicating that the module cannot be found.
not_this_if: Using external modules without proper configuration
root_cause: n8n restricts the use of built-in and external modules for security reasons. By default, built-in modules like 'fs' are not allowed unless explicitly specified in the environment variables.
fix_steps: Restart n8n to apply the changes
Retry executing the Function node with the 'fs' module
agent_instruction: Set the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN environment variable to allow the 'fs' module and restart n8n.
